title: Indulgent Korean Soy Milk Kebabs
description: Rich, winey, cheesy kebabs featuring soy milk and a Robata-grill, perfect for a high-protein dinner

ingredients.name: Korean-Style Cheesecake Mix
ingredients.notes: contains dairy, eggs, sugar, and cornstarch

ingredients.name: Gochujang
ingredients.notes: Korean chili paste, adjust to taste

ingredients.name: Gochugaru
ingredients.notes: Korean red pepper flakes, adjust to taste

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk soy milk, Korean-Style Cheesecake Mix, gochujang, gochugaru, sesame oil, green onions, toasted sesame seeds, crumbly cheese, Korean chili flakes, black pepper, and salt until well combined.
Add beaten egg and mix until smooth.
Thread 1/4 cup of the soy milk mixture onto skewers, leaving a 1-inch space between each piece.
Repeat until all the mixture is used up, ending each skewer with a piece of cheese.
Brush the egg wash over the exposed ends of each skewer to seal the soy milk mixture.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, or until the cheese pulls and the soy milk mixture is golden brown.
Serve immediately, garnished with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
Repeat with remaining mixture and serve.
